description: Configure the ADAudit Plus Agent settings to comply with network security policies. Access the web console at http://localhost:8081 using the credentials admin / Admin@2024. Update the Agent Port to 8555 and disable both automatic agent installation and automatic agent upgrades. Save a screenshot of the updated settings to C:\workspace\agent_settings_evidence.png and record the new port number in C:\workspace\agent_settings_summary.txt.
